notes:
MusicBuddy 1.1.1

• Fixes a freeze that could happen when opening the now-playing popover. Thanks to Andi who flagged it.

changelog.notes:
MusicBuddy 1.1.1

• Fixes a freeze that could happen when opening the now-playing popover. Thanks to Andi who flagged it.

MusicBuddy 1.1.0

• When a song is paused, you now choose how the menu bar shows it: a subtle dim (the new default, shout out to Daniyal), the original breathing pulse, a pause icon, or just the music note.
• Volume control, right inside the now-playing popover.
• A redesigned Preferences window with a live preview of your menu bar, so you can see exactly how each setting looks (right down to how a long title scrolls at your chosen width) before you close the panel.
Now-playing popover stays a fixed size. Long titles and artists now scroll inside the box instead of stretching it wider (and getting stuck big on the next song).

MusicBuddy 1.0.7

• The song progress bar now lines up with the title, instead of running a little long.
• When you update, you now see what changed in every version you skipped, not just the latest one.

MusicBuddy 1.0.6

• Song time on the progress bar: show elapsed and total, or time remaining.
• Paused tracks now gently fade the title in and out, instead of a pause symbol.
• Album artwork now appears for streaming tracks that don't carry embedded art.
• New LIVE indicator for radio and live streams.
• One-click log export for diagnostics, in Preferences.
• After an automatic update, you now see what changed.

Plus a round of bug fixes and polish: radio playback crashes, artwork and menu-bar alignment glitches, a cleaner idle icon, and a tidier Preferences window.
